education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering

experience.title: Manufacturing Engineer
responsibilities: Assisted in optimizing manufacturing processes to reduce waste and improve efficiency.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement engineering solutions.

response.summary: Detail-oriented Mechanical Engineer with foundational experience in manufacturing processes and product design. Skilled in CAD software and committed to improving product quality through data analysis and process optimization.
